title: SessionCreation
description: Session creation payload (spec §28.9 Session States, §17.8 Clarification Question Structure). Tracks the participant session lifecycle within a case.

sessionId.description: Unique identifier for this participant session.

caseId.description: Identifier of the case this session belongs to (§28.9).

participantLabel.description: Optional operator-facing label for this session's participant.

initialState.description: Initial SessionState (§28.9). Defaults to 'not_started'. §28.10 forbids treating 'input_received' as equivalent to 'session_ready_for_synthesis'.
